serverInfo.name: daub-mcp
serverInfo.title: DAUB UI MCP Server
serverInfo.description: Generate, validate, and render DAUB CSS UIs from natural language. 76 components, 20 theme families.

tools.name: generate_ui
tools.description: Generate a complete DAUB UI from a natural language prompt. Returns JSON spec, self-contained HTML, validation, summary.

tools.name: get_component_catalog
tools.description: Returns available DAUB components, props, categories, themes, and an example spec.

tools.name: validate_spec
tools.description: Validate a DAUB spec JSON. Returns status, issues, element count, components used.

tools.name: render_spec
tools.description: Render an existing DAUB spec JSON into self-contained HTML.

tools.name: get_block_library
tools.description: Returns pre-made UI building blocks (dashboards, landing pages, forms, auth, etc.).

tools.name: parse_openui
tools.description: Parse OpenUI Lang code into a DAUB JSON spec.
